block_00: Find out and put it to use
block_02: A trend-following and momentum indicator in one
block_03: The MACD indicator is well-suited to identify entry and exit points for trades. It is one of the most effective oscillators out there and it can be used both for short and long time intervals.
block_04: Red and green bars and fast and slow lines are the two parts of this indicator. By interpreting the meaning of this tool’s signals, you can put MACD into action and utilize it in your strategy. Learn more about how to set up and apply the MACD in the article below.
